fce_metrics_detail.note: S_t / AR are recovered from the observer's morphogenesis_log (tail of last 200 events). I_t is NOT separately retained by FCE-M v0.6.0; if the runner needs I_t it must be computed from delta_X and Phi_s, which are not exposed by this surface.
